title: Prompt Engineering & AI System Design
metaTitle: Prompt Engineering Services | AI System Design | Avaab Razzaq
metaDescription: Production-grade prompt engineering and AI system design. System prompts, evaluation frameworks, and prompt pipelines that make your AI reliable and consistent.
heroSubtitle: Production-grade system prompts, evaluation frameworks, and prompt pipelines that turn unpredictable AI into reliable business tools.
introduction: I design the full prompt system for your AI use case — architecture, examples, constraints, persona, guardrails, and evaluation frameworks — so your AI works consistently in production.

benefits.title: Reliable AI Outputs
benefits.description: Structured prompt systems that produce consistent, on-brand results — not random outputs that change every run.

benefits.title: Regression-Proof
benefits.description: Evaluation test suites that catch prompt regressions before they reach users when models or prompts update.

benefits.title: Model-Optimized
benefits.description: Prompts designed for your specific model — Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini — each has different instruction-following behaviors.

services.name: System Prompt Architecture
services.description: Complete system prompt design: persona, instructions, constraints, output formatting, and guardrails.

services.name: Prompt Evaluation Framework
services.description: Test suites that score AI outputs against expected criteria and catch regressions on every update.

services.name: RAG Prompt Optimization
services.description: Context injection strategy, retrieval prompt design, and no-result handling for RAG systems.

services.name: Chain-of-Thought Engineering
services.description: Reasoning scaffolds and few-shot examples that improve model accuracy on complex tasks.

cta.title: Ready to Fix Your AI Reliability?
cta.description: Book a free call to audit your current prompt system and identify the biggest issues.

faqs.question: Is prompt engineering a real service or can I just do it myself?
faqs.answer: For simple use cases, yes. For production systems where reliability and brand consistency matter, prompt engineering is the difference between a toy and a product.

faqs.question: What models do you design prompts for?
faqs.answer: Claude (Anthropic), GPT-4o (OpenAI), and Gemini Pro primarily. Each has different instruction-following behaviors — I design for the model you're deploying.
